3. **[Major] Performance - Lines 8-10**: Sequential awaits should be parallel
   - Fix: `const [user, posts] = await Promise.all([...]);`

4. **[Minor] Style**: Inconsistent error message format

### Positive Aspects
- Good use of async/await syntax
- Clear function naming"}}]}
